description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a camouflage paint scheme of green and brown, accented by red star insignias and the number '44' on the fuselage. The aircraft features a streamlined fuselage, a single enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy, and a low-mounted straight wing configuration. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both marked with red stars. The landing gear is of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design suggests a World War II-era fighter aircraft, likely of Soviet origin.
description: A camouflaged, single-propeller military airplane with red star insignias, a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the propeller, cockpit canopy, main landing gear, and wing camouflage pattern.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail section, red star insignias, and the tail wheel.
description_view_2: Front-right view displaying the propeller, cockpit, and the number '44' on the fuselage.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the propeller, nose, and the symmetry of the wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
